Freshness, Representing Excellence

Jai Gurudev Industries and Warehousing, is a partnership concern between the partners of General Export Enterprises, Rajsi group (Nagrecha family) and the Jadeshwar trading (Vasant family) in Pachora, Jalgaon. Founded in 2005 the company since then has expanded from merely a warehousing space to a truly state of the art manufacturing facility and Export house.
